title: U.S. is allowing Iranian oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz, says Bessent
summary_full: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.
summary_public: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. is allowing Iranian oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz
